nodes.label: Operation Epic Fury
nodes.summary: US military operation against Iran involving naval strikes and regime-change framing.

props.description: A high-conviction US naval campaign against Iran, including the sinking of warships and submarines.

nodes.label: CMC Leadership Vacancy
nodes.summary: 71% of China's Central Military Commission positions are vacant following inner-circle purges.

props.content: Analysts confirm 71% of CMC positions are vacant; Zhurihe training base went dark for a month.

nodes.label: Taiwan Invasion Implausibility
nodes.summary: A near-term Taiwan invasion is operationally implausible due to the command vacuum in the CMC.

props.content: The command vacuum makes a near-term Taiwan invasion operationally implausible.

nodes.label: Iran Regime Fall Prediction
nodes.summary: Prediction that the Iranian regime will fall by June 30, 2026, currently trading at 37 cents.

props.content: Thesis: Mojtaba Khamenei succession under IRGC pressure and US regime-change pressure.

nodes.label: Tim Cook Departure Prediction
nodes.summary: Prediction regarding Tim Cook leaving Apple, currently trading at 71 cents for 'No'.

props.content: Cook's operational centrality confirmed by CIA briefings and MacBook Neo launch.

nodes.label: China Taiwan 2027 Prediction
nodes.summary: Prediction that China will invade Taiwan by 2027, currently trading at 11 cents.

props.content: Structural barriers like the CMC vacancy hinder near-term invasion plans.

nodes.label: MacBook Neo Launch
nodes.summary: Successful launch of the MacBook Neo reinforcing Tim Cook's leadership.

props.content: MacBook Neo launch success reinforces Cook’s leadership during geopolitical volatility.

nodes.label: Ukraine Peace Stalled
nodes.summary: Zelensky confirms US focus on Iran is delaying ceasefire diplomacy and air defense supplies.

props.content: US distraction in Iran is stalling ceasefire diplomacy and air defense supplies for Ukraine.
